objectives: Set up a working Android development environment
Create and run a simple Kotlin-based Android app
Use debugging tools to inspect and fix basic issues
learning_path.title: Android Development Environment Setup and First Kotlin App

objectives: Build a basic UI using Jetpack Compose
Structure UI code for readability and reuse
Run and debug UI behavior in the emulator/device
learning_path.title: Jetpack Compose UI Fundamentals

objectives: Apply Mvvm Architecture to separate UI and logic
Use Android Jetpack (Architecture Components) to manage app structure
Integrate Compose UI with an MVVM-based flow
learning_path.title: Android Jetpack Architecture Components with MVVM

objectives: Use Coroutines to perform background work safely
Connect coroutine-based logic to an MVVM structure
Debug common concurrency and lifecycle-related issues
learning_path.title: Asynchronous Programming with Coroutines

objectives: Implement network calls using Rest Apis (Retrofit/Okhttp)
Handle responses and errors and surface results to the UI
Integrate network operations with Coroutines and MVVM
learning_path.title: Consuming REST APIs with Retrofit/Okhttp

objectives: Use software design patterns to improve maintainability
Develop a software prototype that combines UI, architecture, and networking
Iterate quickly using debugging to validate behavior
learning_path.title: Design Patterns and Prototype Development

objectives: Apply tools for software configuration management to manage changes
Establish a repeatable workflow for building and testing in the IDE
Track and resolve issues using debugging practices
learning_path.title: Configuration Management and Development Workflow

objectives: Relate digital systems fundamentals to mobile device behavior
Use digital systems understanding to reason about performance and debugging
Connect low-level concepts to practical programming decisions
learning_path.title: Digital Systems Concepts for Mobile Developers

matched_occupation.description: Mobile application developers implement applications software for mobile devices, based on the designs provided, using general or specific development tools for device operating systems.
matched_occupation.label: mobile application developer
